- gcc

- '14'

- sysroot

- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9

  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x

- 3.11.* *_cpython

- linux-64

name: gsw

about.summary: Gibbs Seawater Oceanographic Package of TEOS-10
Gibbs Seawater Oceanographic Package of TEOS-10

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: 3.6.21

package:
  name: gsw
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/g/gsw/gsw-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 6e0609d374916b4393484b9c7b32666d36dda74d900a40d19c766484ac295efa

build:
  number: 0
  skip: match(python, "<3.11")
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - numpy >=2,<3
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
  host:
    - python
    - numpy >=2,<3
    - pip
    - setuptools >=42
    - setuptools-scm >=3.4
  run:
    - python
    - numpy

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - gsw
  - requirements:
      run:
        - pip
        - pytest
        - pandas >=2
    script:
      - pip check
      - pytest --pyargs gsw

about:
  summary: Gibbs Seawater Oceanographic Package of TEOS-10
  license: BSD-3-Clause
  license_file: LICENSE.txt
  homepage: https://pypi.org/project/gsw/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - efiring
    - ocefpaf

about.summary: Gibbs Seawater Oceanographic Package of TEOS-10
